steps.title: Eliminate y by subtracting the equations
steps.content:
Both equations have coefficient 1 for $y$, so subtracting the second from the first eliminates $y$:

$$(24x + y) - (6x + y) = 48 - 72$$
$$18x = -24$$
$$x = -\frac{4}{3}$$

steps.title: Substitute to find y
steps.content:
Substitute $x = -\frac{4}{3}$ into the second equation:

$$6 \left(-\frac{4}{3}\right) + y = 72$$
$$-8 + y = 72$$
$$y = 80$$
